/usr/bin/c++ -g -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/simplemovie.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/simplemovie.dir/sample/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simplemovie.dir/sample/src/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simplemovie.dir/__/__/code/main/tuidunaligned.cpp.o -o simplemovie  libradmovie.a /usr/lib/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/libopenal.so ../pure3d/libp3d.a ../pure3d/libpddi.a ../radcore/libradcore.a ../radsound/libradsound.a /usr/lib/libpng.so /usr/lib/libz.so ../radcontent/libradcontent.a ../pure3d/libpddi.a /usr/lib/libGL.so ../radmath/libradmath.a /usr/lib/libopenal.so ../radcore/libradcore.a /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.64 /usr/lib/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/libavformat.so /usr/lib/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/libswresample.so /usr/lib/libswscale.so /usr/lib/libavutil.so
